suppress.notes:
file name: commons-io-2.11.0.jar
Fixed in 2.14.0
Package imported by the `jsonschema2pojo` plugin before 1.2.2. jsonschema2dataclass:6.0.0 imports jsonschema2pojo:1.1.2.
jsonschema2dataclass has not had a release since Jan 2023, so the suppression date has been set until Q3 2026
The org.apache.commons.io.input.XmlStreamReader class may excessively consume CPU resources when processing maliciously crafted input. The inputs we provide do not result in this issue.

file name: jsonschema2pojo-core-1.1.2.jar
No available fix at the time of writing.
jsonschema2dataclass:6.0.0 imports jsonschema2pojo:1.1.2.
jsonschema2dataclass has not had a release since Jan 2023, so the suppression date has been set until Q3 2026
The attack requires a maliciously crafted yaml spec, which would require write access to the source code. The inputs we provide do not result in this issue.

file name: commons-lang-2.6.jar
Fixed in commons-lang3:3.18.0.
Package imported by `jsonschema2pojo-core@1.1.2`
jsonschema2dataclass has not had a release since Jan 2023, so the suppression date has been set until Q3 2026
The attack requires a maliciously crafted yaml spec, which would require write access to the source code. The inputs we provide do not result in this issue.

file name: commons-lang-3.17.0.jar
Fixed in commons-lang3:3.18.0.
Package imported by `jsonschema2pojo-core@1.1.2`
jsonschema2dataclass has not had a release since Jan 2023, so the suppression date has been set until Q3 2026
The attack requires a maliciously crafted yaml spec, which would require write access to the source code. The inputs we provide do not result in this issue.

file name: log4j-api-2.24.3.jar
This vulnerability is fixed in 2.25.4.
Spring boot versions 4.0.0+ imports 2.25.4.
The project does not satisfy the narrow conditions that CVE requires, and therefore not explitable.

file name: log4j-api-2.24.3.jar
This vulnerability is fixed in 2.25.4.
Spring boot versions 4.0.0+ imports 2.25.4.
The project does not satisfy the narrow conditions that CVE requires, and therefore not explitable.

file name: log4j-to-slf4j-2.24.3.jar
This vulnerability is fixed in 2.25.4.
Spring boot versions 4.0.0+ imports 2.25.4.
The project does not satisfy the narrow conditions that CVE requires, and therefore not explitable.

file name: log4j-to-slf4j-2.24.3.jar
This vulnerability is fixed in 2.25.4.
Spring boot versions 4.0.0+ imports 2.25.4.
The project does not satisfy the narrow conditions that CVE requires, and therefore not explitable.

file name: netty-transport-native-epoll-4.1.132.Final-linux-x86_64.jar
This is a false positive. The vulnerability is introduced in 4.2.0 and fixed in 4.1.13, and therefore this package version (at 4.1.x) is not affected.
See https://github.com/github/advisory-database/pull/7608 for the correction.

file name: spring-security-web-6.5.10.jar
This is a false positive. The vulnerability is introduced in 7.0.0 and fixed in 7.0.5.
See https://spring.io/security/cve-2026-22747.
